name: Docs Suite Automation

on:
push:
paths:
- 'docs/.docx'
- 'docs/.md'
workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
docs-suite:
runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps:
- name: Checkout repo
uses: actions/checkout@v3

- name: Install pandoc
run: sudo apt-get install -y pandoc

- name: Convert DOCX to Markdown
run: |
for file in docs/*.docx; do
base=file" .docx)
pandoc "{base}.md"
done

- name: Update README-suite.md
run: |
echo "# CrystalCastle – Documentation Suite 📚" > docs/README-suite.md
echo "" >> docs/README-suite.md
echo "## Core README" >> docs/README-suite.md
cat docs/Core-README.md >> docs/README-suite.md
echo "" >> docs/README-suite.md
echo "## Reviewer Checklist ✅" >> docs/README-suite.md
cat docs/CheckList.md >> docs/README-suite.md
echo "" >> docs/README-suite.md
echo "## Repo Overview Diagram" >> docs/README-suite.md
cat docs/Mermaid-diagram.md >> docs/README-suite.md

- name: Commit updates
run: |
git config --global user.name "github-actions"
git config --global user.email "actions@github.com"
git add docs/*.md
git commit -m "Auto-update README-suite.md with converted docs"
git push
